3251100.name: Tyro: Legend of Whisperwood Alpha
3251100.description:
This is a playable alpha slice of our upcoming consequence-based metroidvania, Tyro: Legend of Whisperwood. While not representative of final progression systems, this standalone experience offers a focused glimpse into the tone, combat, visuals, and storytelling we’re building toward.

You’ll play as Tyro, a vengeful field mouse navigating Beetle City — an eerie, isolated district ruled by beetles and untouched by the spreading Gladeblight, a sickness turning the creatures of Whisperwood into violent husks.

In this alpha slice, you can expect:

  • Explore a colorful, hand-drawn 2D world full of animated detail and quirky charm

  • Voice-acted characters that enhance the atmosphere and bring the world of Whisperwood to life

  • Challenging boss battles, including a hidden secret boss for players who explore deeply

  • Collectible power-ups that enhance your movement and combat abilities

  • Abilities including slashing, dashing, slingshot attacks, and healing

  • Light environmental puzzles and discoverable lore that hint at the broader story

This slice takes place during a later part of the game and is designed to offer a standalone 2+ hour experience. It’s a small but meaningful taste of the world we’re crafting.
3251100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
